afterFileEdit.description: Run typecheck on the package containing the edited file; inject warning into agent context on failure (module 03 computational sensor)

beforeShellExecution.description: Refuse shell commands that touch sensitive files (module 06 human override)

beforeReadFile.description: Refuse reading files matching the sensitive denylist (module 06)

stop.description: Log stop events for observability (module 05). NOTE: Cursor 1.7 beta ignores stop hook output JSON, so this is observation-only. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md.
